mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM T_PRD_WORK_PLAN_LOCATION WHERE WORK_PLAN_ID IN
#{item}

SELECT * FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO WHERE TRUST_ID IN
#{item}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_PRD_WORK_PLAN( ID, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, WORK_DATE, CLASS_CODE, CLASS_NAME, TRUST_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, HATCH, PLAN_NO, PLAN_TYPE, PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME, WORK_CONTENT, DEPT_ID, DEPT_NAME, QUANTITY_PLAN, TON_PLAN, START_TIME_PLAN, END_TIME_PLAN, START_WORK_TIME, END_WORK_TIME, REMARK, STATUS, BERTH_ID, BERTH_NAME, FRONT_TALLY_BY, FRONT_TALLY_BY_NAME, BACK_TALLY_BY, BACK_TALLY_BY_NAME, DISPATCH_BY, DISPATCH_BY_NAME, EXAMINE_BY, EXAMINE_BY_NAME, EXAMINE_TIME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, EQUIPMENT_NAMES_FRONT, EQUIPMENT_NAMES_BACK, EQUIPMENT_NAMES_ASSIST, EQUIPMENT_NAMES_RESHIPMENT, MASS_NAMES_SOURCE, MASS_NAMES_TARGET, RESHIPMENT_TYPE_CODE, BUS_CARGO_INFO_ID, CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE, CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, CARGO_OWNER_ID, CARGO_OWNER_NAME )VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{companyId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{companyName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{classCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{className, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trustId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{shipvoyageId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{shipvoyageItemId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{hatch, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{planNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{planType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{processCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{processName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workContent, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{deptName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantityPlan, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{tonPlan,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{startTimePlan, jdbcType=DATE}, #{endTimePlan, jdbcType=DATE}, #{startWorkTime, jdbcType=DATE}, #{endWorkTime, jdbcType=DATE}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{berthId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{berthName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{frontTallyBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{frontTallyByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{backTallyBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{backTallyByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dispatchBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dispatchByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{examineBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{examineByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{examineTime, jdbcType=DATE}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now}, #{equipmentNamesFront, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{equipmentNamesBack, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{equipmentNamesAssist, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{equipmentNamesReshipment, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{massNamesSource, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{massNamesTarget, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reshipmentTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{busCargoInfoId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{cargoCategoryCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoCategoryName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoOwnerId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoOwnerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_PRD_WORK_PLAN SET COMPANY_ID = #{companyId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, COMPANY_NAME = #{companyName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, WORK_DATE = #{workDate, jdbcType=DATE}, CLASS_CODE = #{classCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CLASS_NAME = #{className, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TRUST_ID = #{trustId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SHIPVOYAGE_ID = #{shipvoyageId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = #{shipvoyageItemId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, HATCH = #{hatch,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PROCESS_CODE = #{processCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PROCESS_NAME = #{processName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, WORK_CONTENT = #{workContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, QUANTITY_PLAN = #{quantityPlan,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TON_PLAN = #{tonPlan,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, START_TIME_PLAN = #{startTimePlan,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, END_TIME_PLAN = #{endTimePlan,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, START_WORK_TIME = #{startWorkTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, END_WORK_TIME = #{endWorkTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REMARK = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BERTH_ID = #{berthId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BERTH_NAME = #{berthName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}, EQUIPMENT_NAMES_FRONT = #{equipmentNamesFront, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EQUIPMENT_NAMES_BACK = #{equipmentNamesBack, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EQUIPMENT_NAMES_ASSIST = #{equipmentNamesAssist, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EQUIPMENT_NAMES_RESHIPMENT = #{equipmentNamesReshipment, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MASS_NAMES_SOURCE = #{massNamesSource, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MASS_NAMES_TARGET = #{massNamesTarget, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESHIPMENT_TYPE_CODE = #{reshipmentTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BUS_CARGO_INFO_ID = #{busCargoInfoId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE = #{cargoCategoryCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME = #{cargoCategoryName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM T_PRD_WORK_PLAN
and STATUS = '10'
and STATUS != '10'
and STATUS = '10'
and STATUS = '20'
#{item, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM T_PRD_WORK_PLAN
and STATUS = '10'
and STATUS != '10'
and STATUS = '10'
and STATUS = '20'
AND ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT COUNT(0) FROM T_YARD_TALLY tyt
PLAN_ID = #{planId}
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_PRD_WORK_PLAN SET STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
EXAMINE_BY = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EXAMINE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EXAMINE_TIME = #{now,jdbcType=DATE},
EXAMINE_BY = null, EXAMINE_BY_NAME = null, EXAMINE_TIME = null,
UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
#{item, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND STATUS = '10'
AND STATUS = '20'
mapper.select: SELECT PROCESS_CD AS PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NM AS PROCESS_NAME, PLAN_TYPE_NM, PLAN_TYPE_CD FROM M_WORK_PROCESS WHERE PLAN_TYPE_CD= '3'

SELECT BERTHING_TIME_PLAN berthingTimePlan, LEAVE_BERTH_TIME_PLAN leave_berthTimePlan, STARTTIME_PLAN starttimePlan, ENDTIME_PLAN endtimePlan, BERTH_ID berthId, BERTH_NAME berthName, NIGHT_WORK_NUM nightWorkNum, MORN_WORK_NUM mornWorkNum FROM T_DIS_SHIP_DAYNIGTTPLAN WHERE PLAN_DATE = TO_DATE(#{planDate},'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND SHIPVOYAGE_ID = (SELECT SHIPVOYAGE_ID FROM T_BUS_TRUST WHERE ID = #{trustId})

SELECT A.ID, A.PROCESS_CD AS "value", A.PROCESS_NM AS "label" FROM M_WORK_PROCESS A LEFT JOIN M_DICT_DATA B ON B.DICT_VALUE = A.PROCESS_TYPE_CD AND B.DICT_TYPE = 'PROCESS_TYPE' WHERE A.PARENT_ID = -1 AND B.DICT_VALUE = '0001' ORDER BY A.PROCESS_NM

SELECT A.ID, A.PROCESS_CD AS "value", A.PROCESS_NM AS "label", A.SOURCE_CD AS "sourceCd", A.TARGET_CD AS "targetCd", A.NEW_PROCESS AS "newProcess" FROM M_WORK_PROCESS A LEFT JOIN M_DICT_DATA B ON B.DICT_VALUE = A.PROCESS_TYPE_CD AND B.DICT_TYPE = 'PROCESS_TYPE'
A.PARENT_ID = -1 AND B.DICT_VALUE = '0001'
AND A.PLAN_TYPE_CD = #{planType,jdbcType=BIGINT}
ORDER BY A.PROCESS_NM DESC

SELECT DISTINCT A . ID "id", D .WORK_AREA_CD "workAreaCd" FROM T_PRD_WORK_PLAN A, T_BUS_TRUST_LOCATION c, M_STORAGE_YARD D WHERE A .TRUST_ID = c.TRUST_ID AND c.STOREHOUSE_ID = D ."ID" AND A.ID IN
#{id}
select COUNT(*) from T_YARD_TALLY where DEL_FLAG = 0 and PLAN_ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} group by PLAN_ID
select TPWP.PlAN_NO PLAN_NO,TBT.TRUST_NO TRUST_NO from T_PRD_WORK_PLAN TPWP left join T_BUS_TRUST TBT on TPWP.TRUST_ID = TBT.ID where TPWP.id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT T1.ID, CASE WHEN T1.COMPANY_ID IS NULL THEN T5.COMPANY_ID ELSE T1.COMPANY_ID END COMPANY_ID, CASE WHEN T1.COMPANY_NAME IS NULL THEN T5.COMPANY_NAME ELSE T1.COMPANY_NAME END COMPANY_NAME, T1.WORK_DATE, T1.CLASS_CODE, T1.CLASS_NAME, CASE WHEN T1.TRUST_ID IS NULL AND t.TRUST_ID IS NOT NULL THEN t.TRUST_ID ELSE T1.TRUST_ID END TRUST_ID, T5.TRUST_NO, T1.SHIPVOYAGE_ID, T1.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, CASE WHEN T1.SHIPVOYAGE_ID IS NULL THEN null ELSE CONCAT(CONCAT(T3.SHIP_NAME, '_') , T4.VOYAGE) END SHIPVOYAGE_LABEL, T3.SHIP_NAME, T4.VOYAGE, T1.HATCH, T1.PLAN_NO, T1.PROCESS_CODE, T1.PROCESS_NAME, T1.WORK_CONTENT, T1.DEPT_ID, T1.DEPT_NAME, T1.QUANTITY_PLAN, T1.TON_PLAN, T1.START_TIME_PLAN, T1.END_TIME_PLAN, T1.START_WORK_TIME, T1.END_WORK_TIME, T1.REMARK, T1.STATUS, M1.NM AS STATUS_LABEL, T1.BERTH_ID, T1.BERTH_NAME, T1.FRONT_TALLY_BY, T1.FRONT_TALLY_BY_NAME, T1.BACK_TALLY_BY, T1.BACK_TALLY_BY_NAME, T1.DISPATCH_BY, T1.DISPATCH_BY_NAME, T1.CREATE_BY, T1.CREATE_BY_NAME, T1.CREATE_TIME, T1.UPDATE_BY, T1.UPDATE_BY_NAME, T1.UPDATE_TIME, T1.EXAMINE_BY, T1.EXAMINE_BY_NAME, T1.EXAMINE_TIME, T1.RESHIPMENT_TYPE_CODE, M2.NM AS RESHIPMENT_TYPE_Label, T1.BUS_CARGO_INFO_ID, T4.CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE, T4.CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME, NVL(M_SH.HATCH_NUM, 0) HATCH_NUM, T4.LOAD_UNLOAD, T5.PORT_CODE, T5.PORT_NAME, T8.PACKING_CODE, CASE WHEN T1.PROCESS_CODE IS NULL THEN TO_CHAR(T1.PLAN_TYPE) ELSE TO_CHAR((SELECT PLAN_TYPE_CD FROM M_WORK_PROCESS m0 WHERE T1.PROCESS_CODE = m0.PROCESS_CD )) END PLAN_TYPE FROM (SELECT PDP.TRUST_ID, SUM(PDP.PLAN_TON) planTon FROM T_DIS_PORT_DAYNIGHTPLAN PDP
AND TO_CHAR(PLAN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') = TO_CHAR(#{JSGWorkDate} -1, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND TO_CHAR(PLAN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') = TO_CHAR(#{JSGWorkDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
GROUP BY PDP.TRUST_ID ) t LEFT JOIN T_PRD_WORK_PLAN T1 on t.TRUST_ID = T1.TRUST_ID and T1.WORK_DATE = #{workDate} AND T1.CLASS_CODE = #{classCode} LEFT JOIN T_BUS_TRUST T5 ON t.TRUST_ID = T5.ID LEFT JOIN m_constants M1 ON T1.STATUS = M1.CD AND M1.TYPE_CD = 'WORK_PLAN_STATUS' LEFT JOIN m_constants M2 ON T1.RESHIPMENT_TYPE_CODE = M2.CD AND M2.TYPE_CD = 'RESHIPMENT_TYPE' LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE T3 ON T1.SHIPVOYAGE_ID = T3.ID LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM T4 ON T4.ID = T1.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID LEFT JOIN M_SHIP M_SH ON T3.SHIP_ID = M_SH.ID LEFT JOIN ( select REGEXP_REPLACE( LISTAGG ( TO_CHAR( PACKING_CODE ), ',' ) WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY PACKING_CODE ),'([^,]+)(,\1)+', '\1' ) PACKING_CODE ,TRUST_ID FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO GROUP BY TRUST_ID ) T8 ON T5.ID = T8.TRUST_ID ORDER BY TRUST_NO ASC

SELECT CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(M3.STORAGE_YARD_NM, '/'), M2.STORAGE_YARD_NM), '/'), M1.STORAGE_YARD_NM) as "label", CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(CONCAT(M3.STORAGE_YARD_NM, '/'), M2.STORAGE_YARD_NM), '/'), M1.STORAGE_YARD_NM) as "massNameFull", M1.ID as "value", M1.ID as "massId", M1.STORAGE_YARD_NM as "massName", M3.ID as "storehouseId", M3.STORAGE_YARD_NM as "storehouseName", M2.ID as "regionId", M2.STORAGE_YARD_NM as "regionName" FROM M_STORAGE_YARD M1, M_STORAGE_YARD M2, M_STORAGE_YARD M3 WHERE M1.STORAGE_YARD_LEVEL = '3' AND M1.PARENT_ID = M2.ID AND M2.STORAGE_YARD_LEVEL = '2' AND M2.PARENT_ID = M3.ID AND M3.STORAGE_YARD_LEVEL = '1' AND M1.ID in( select distinct MASS_ID from T_PRD_PORT_STORAGE where CLEAN_MASS_SIGN = '0' and CARGO_INFO_ID in (select T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO.CARGO_INFO_ID from T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO where TRUST_ID = (select trust_id from T_PRD_WORK_PLAN where id = #{planId,jdbcType=BIGINT}) ) )

select tbt.type "planType", MWP.SOURCE_CD "sourceCd", MWP.TARGET_CD "targetCd" from t_prd_work_plan tpwp left join t_bus_trust tbt on tpwp.trust_id = tbt.id left join M_WORK_PROCESS MWP on MWP.PROCESS_CD = tpwp.PROCESS_CODE where tpwp.id = #{planId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
